svg.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; fill: none; height: auto; transition-property: none; visibility: visible; width: 18px

path.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; fill: rgb(44, 9, 1); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible
